tinystories_small.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim loved to play outside. One day, he found a big stick in the park. He thought it would be fun to play with the stick.
Tim met a girl named Sue. Sue saw the stick and said, "I want to play too!" Tim and Sue decided to share the stick. They took turns holding it and running around. They had a lot of fun.
After playing, Tim and Sue sat under a tree. They looked at the sky and saw the big clouds. They knew it was time to go home. Tim and Sue said goodbye and promised to play together again soon.
<|endoftext|>

lr_sweep_3e-4.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim loved to play with his toy gun. He would shoot at his toy gun and pretend to shoot at things. Tim had a toy gun that he used to shoot.
One day, Tim's toy gun was gone. He looked everywhere but could not find it. Tim was very sad. He asked his mom, "Mom, where is my toy gun?" His mom said, "I don't know, Tim. Let's look for it together."
They looked in the house, the living room, and the bedroom. But they could not find the toy gun. Tim was very sad. He thought his toy gun was lost forever.
Then, Tim saw his toy gun in the garden. He picked it up and started to shoot at it. Suddenly, a big wind came and blew the toy gun away. Tim was so happy! He learned that if he wants to shoot his toy gun, he can make a big difference.
<|endoftext|>

lr_sweep_3e-3.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim was very hungry. He wanted to eat something yummy. He looked around his house and saw a big red apple on the table. Tim wanted to eat the apple, but he could not reach it.
Tim asked his mom, "Mom, can you help me get the apple?" His mom said, "Yes, Tim. I will help you." She went to the kitchen and got a chair. She put the chair next to the table. Tim was so happy.
But then, Tim's big sister, Sue, came into the room. She saw the chair and wanted to play. Sue tried to push the chair away from Tim. Tim was sad. He wanted the apple so much. He said, "Sue, I am sorry. I will not do it again." Sue said, "It's okay, Tim. We can share the apple." Tim and Sue ate the apple together. They were both happy and full.
<|endoftext|>

batch_size_32.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim was very enthusiastic about finding a toy called an automobile. He loved to play with it all day long. One day, Tim went to the park with his mom and dad. He took his automobile with him.
At the park, Tim saw a girl named Sue. Sue was sad because she lost her toy. Tim wanted to help Sue. He asked, "Why are you sad?" Sue said, "I lost my toy." Tim wanted to help Sue. They looked for the toy together.
They looked in the park, the park, and the sandbox. Then, they found the toy! Sue was so happy. She hugged Tim and said, "Thank you for helping me find my toy!" Tim felt proud that he could help Sue. They played together in the park all day.
<|endoftext|>

batch_size_64.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim loved to play with his toy cars. One day, he went to the park with his mom. At the park, he saw a big tree with a door at the end of the tree. Tim wanted to see what was behind the door.
Tim's mom said, "Tim, be careful! The door is open, and the door is locked." Tim was scared, but he listened to his mom. He went to the door and turned it. The door opened, and Tim saw a big room with lots of toys.
Tim was so happy that he found the key. He ran to the door and said, "I found the key! Let's play with the toys!" His mom smiled and said, "That's great, Tim! Let's go play with the toys." They played with the toys and had a lot of fun.
<|endoftext|>

batch_size_256.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim loved to play outside in the sun. One day, he saw a big tree with a hole in it. Tim was very curious about the hole.
Tim's mom saw him looking at the hole. She told him not to go near the hole. But Tim was ignorant and wanted to see what was inside. So, he walked to the hole and looked inside.
Inside the hole, Tim found a big, shiny ball. He was so happy! He played with the ball all day long. Tim learned that sometimes, it is good to listen to mom and dad. And that is how Tim found a new friend in the big tree.
<|endoftext|>

ablation_post_norm.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim was very enthusiastic about playing with his toys. He loved to make up stories and pretend to be a brave knight. One day, Tim was playing with his toy car when he heard a strange noise. He was very curious and wanted to know what it was.
Tim walked up to the noise and saw a little bird stuck in a tree. The bird was scared and couldn't fly away. Tim wanted to help the bird, so he tried to climb the tree to save it. But he was too small and didn't know how to reach the bird.
Just then, a big wind came and blew the bird out of the tree. The bird was free and happy. Tim was surprised and said, "Thank you, bird!" The bird was not a real dragon, but a magic friend. They played together all day and became best friends.
<|endoftext|>

ablation_nope.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim loved to play outside in the sun. One day, he saw a big tree with a swing. Tim wanted to play on the swing, but he was too small to reach it.
Tim had an idea. He saw a tall ladder near the tree. He climbed up the ladder and got ready to push the swing. But when he pushed the swing, he saw that it was not a swing at all. It was a big, red balloon!
Tim was surprised and didn't know what to do. He looked at the balloon and thought for a moment. Then, he had an idea. He got his toy phone and started to play with it. Tim was happy that he could play on the swing now.
<|endoftext|>

ablation_silu_ffn.sample:
Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Tim. Tim was very enthusiastic about his school. He loved to learn new things and play with his friends. One day, Tim's teacher told the class to bring a big surprise.
The surprise was a big box of new toys. Tim was so excited! He opened the box and found a new toy car inside. Tim was so happy! He played with the new toy car all day long.
The next day, Tim's teacher asked him to take the new toy car back to school. Tim did as he was told and took the new toy car home. His friends were so happy to see the new toy car and they all played together. Tim felt very proud of himself for finding the surprise in his new toy box.
<|endoftext|>
